title: Stayin' Alive
album: Saturday Night Fever∶ The Original Movie Sound Track (deluxe edition)
why_this_song: Stayin' Alive by Bee Gees (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Life goin' nowhere, somebody help me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stayin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stayin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "alive" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "alive" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm a woman's man, no time to talk
Feel the city breakin' and everybody shakin'
Ah, ah, ah, ah, stayin' alive

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Stayin' Alive" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Stayin' Alive"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bee Gees one question about "Stayin' Alive", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bee Gees sobre "Stayin' Alive", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Stayin' Alive" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Stayin' Alive" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Stayin' Alive", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Stayin' Alive", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Stayin' Alive" was released in 1977. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Stayin' Alive" foi lançada em 1977. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
